worker_attempts.visible_answer:
You're very welcome, Sera! That's fantastic to hear that you've already applied. 🎉

The **Silver Rewards Card** will serve you beautifully — earning 4.0% back on all those conference flights, hotel stays, and software subscriptions, while still giving you 1.0% on everyday purchases. And with that **$0 annual fee**, all your cash back stays where it belongs — in your pocket!

Here's a quick recap of what to expect after approval:
- **Activate your card** when it arrives
- **Set up autopay** to avoid late fees
- **Use it for travel and software** to maximize that sweet 4.0% rate
- Redeem once you've earned at least **$17** in rewards

Best of luck with your environmental initiatives — may your carbon footprint shrink while your cash back grows! 🌍💚 If you ever need anything else, don't hesitate to reach out.
